prompt: generate an alternative comic strip using the same art style, different character design, and same panel layout as the reference image, but also make sure the monster making a 'Roarrrrrrrrr' sound effect instead, maintaining the dramatic composition and visual storytelling approach
prompt_refined: Generate a two-panel comic strip using the art style, dramatic composition, and visual storytelling approach of image 1. Maintain the exact vertical panel layout of image 1. In the top panel, depict a new monster character (different from the monster in image 1) screaming with its mouth wide open and clawed hands raised, surrounded by a bright, glowing aura. Ensure the monster emits a prominent 'Roarrrrrrrrr' sound effect, replacing the 'CReeeeeeeeee' sound effect visible in image 1. In the bottom panel, feature new character designs for the human-like figures (one on the left, one on the right, and a smaller creature in the center) reacting intensely to the monster, maintaining the overall background glow and dynamic angle from image 1.
objects: New monster character screaming with mouth wide open and clawed hands raised (in top panel)
Bright, glowing aura around the monster
New human-like character (on the left in bottom panel)
New human-like character (on the right in bottom panel)
New smaller creature character (in the center in bottom panel)
